forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south later this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely later tonight. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h shifting southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending northeasterly in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 30 to 40 km/h.

Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower later tonight. Winds northerly 25 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. The chance of morning frost near the eastern border. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely later tonight. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest later tonight. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the east. Slight chance of a shower in the north, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain west of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 12:30pm to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, most likely at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower later tonight. Winds northerly 30 to 40 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light in the morning then becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers near the west coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 30 to 45 km/h tending northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. Winds northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the far west, most likely later this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain south of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 26.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the evening. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 26.
Clear. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 19 to 30.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 28.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 28.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 29.
